summary: Excellent audience capture of a smooth ’80‑81 set, with the best‑sounding source yet.
review: The show is praised for its classic 1980‑81 set list and smooth, sweet playing that fits the vibe of the town. The Beyer 88 tape recording captures the room perfectly, delivering crystal‑clear tones despite a sizable crowd, making this the best‑sounding source of the performance.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed positive review highlights both an excellent recording and a solid musical performance; weighted average of show (≈4) and recording (≈5) yields ~4.3.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Beyer 88 tape captures the room perfectly; crowd chatter is minimal and in non‑English languages, so it doesn’t interfere with listening.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Typical ’80‑81 set list that flows smoothly and sweetly, matching the relaxed mood of the venue.
